name: Fearsome
description:
Enemy fighters must take a Panic test when
making melee attack actions against this
fighter.

name: Oppressor
description:
Once per battle round, when an enemy
fighter makes the 'Retreat' action, this
fighter can make the 'Cut Them Down'
reaction without having to forfeit an action
to do so.

name: Weapon Master
description:
Select a melee weapon type. When making
attack actions with weapons of that type,
increase the critical damage characteristic
by 1.

name: Staggering Blows
description:
A fighter can use this ability after allocating
damage points to an enemy fighter with a
melee attack action. That enemy fighter
cannot use reactions for the rest of the
battle round. In addition, if the melee
attack action allocated damage points from
a critical hit, the target cannot use abilities
for the rest of the battle round.

name: Shield Bash
description:
This ability requires the fighter being
equipped with a shield. Select an enemy
fighter within 1"" of this fighter. That fighter
makes a free retreat action directly away
from this fighter. If it cannot move away
from this fighter, allocate (X/2) damage
points to that fighter instead.

name: Maintain Momentum
description:
A fighter can only use this ability if an
enemy fighter has been taken down by an
attack action made by them this activation.
This fighter makes a bonus move action or
a bonus attack action

name: Indomitable
description:
Each time this fighter is activated, you
can remove D3 damage points allocated
to them.

name: Nine Lives
description:
When rolling for injuries, this fighter can
re-roll a result of 11-12. In addition, there
is no limit to the amount of permanent
injuries this fighter may have.

name: Tough
description:
Each time an attack action scores any
critical hits on this fighter, 1 of those critical
hits becomes a hit instead.

name: Endure
description:
A fighter can make this reaction after they
are targeted by an attack action but before
the hit rolls are made. Subtract 1 from the
damage points allocated by each hit and
critical hit (to a minimum of 1) from that
attack action.

name: Shield Wall
description:
Until the end of the battle round, add
(X/2) to the Defense characteristic of all
friendly fighters within 1" of this fighter
when targeted by ranged attack actions.

name: Bodyguard
description:
Select a friendly Hero within 1" of this
fighter. Until the end of the battle round,
that Hero cannot be targeted while they are
within 1" of this fighter.

name: Duelist
description:
Once per battle round, this fighter can make
the 'Counter' reaction without having to
forfeit an action to do so.

name: Infiltrator
description:
At the beginning of the first battle round,
this fighter can make a free move action.

name: Stealthy
description:
Whenever this fighter is targeted by an
enemy fighter, it is considered to be in
cover if both of the following are true:
● It is more than 6" from the enemy fighter.
● It is within 1" of an obstacle, or part of
its base is underneath a vantage point.

name: Wall-Runner
description:
This fighter may ignore the first 3"" moved
vertically when making move actions.

name: Step-Aside
description:
A fighter can make this reaction after they
are targeted by a melee attack action but
before any hit rolls are made. Roll 1 dice for
each successful hit. On a 4+, that hit counts
as a miss and is discarded.

name: Disengage
description:
A fighter can only use this ability if they are
within 1"" of an enemy fighter. This fighter
makes a free Retreat action.

name: Trip
description:
After this fighter's next melee attack action
in this activation, if at least 1 hit roll from
that attack action results in a hit, the target
must forfeit 1 of their actions in this battle
round. If the target has already activated
or if they have no more actions to forfeit,
allocate (X/2) damage points to the target
instead.

name: Quick Shot
description:
This fighter makes a free ranged attack
action.

name: Rapid Reload
description:
At the end of this fighter's activation, you
may reload one of this fighter's weapons
with the Reload special rule.

name: Surgical Precision
description:
Select a ranged weapon type. When making
attack actions with weapons of that type,
increase the Critical Damage characteristic
by 1.

name: Trick Shot
description:
When this fighter makes a ranged attack
action, the target does not count as being
in cover.

name: Patient Hunter
description:
When an enemy fighter ends a move action
while visible to this fighter, this fighter can
target that enemy fighter with a free ranged
attack action.

name: Reckless Shot
description:
For this fighter's next ranged attack action,
it may target enemy fighters within 1 of
friendly fighters.

name: Eagle Eyes
description:
When making an attack action using a bow,
crossbow or handgun, this fighter may
ignore the maximum range of the weapon,
but if they do, they must reduce their Shoot
characteristic by 1.

name: Arcane Attunement
description:
WIZARD only. Start each battle with one
additional Wyrd Dice.

name: Tactician
description:
LEADER only. Start each battle with one
additional Wyrd Dice.

name: Pious
description:
PRIEST only. Start each battle with one
additional Wyrd Dice.

name: Charismatic
description:
Once per battle, this fighter can use
the 'Inspiring Presence' ability without
needing or spending ability dice to do so.

name: Underground Contacts
description:
When employing a hired sword, roll a d6.
On a 4+, you may reduce the hiring fee by
50% (rounding up).

name: Maintain Momentum
description:
LEADER only. When seizing the initiative,
if there is a tie, do not roll off. Instead the
player controlling this fighter chooses
which tied player has the initiative. If
multiple warbands have this talent, the
players of those warbands roll off, and
the winner chooses which tied player
has the initiative.

name: Fall Back!
description:
A fighter can make this
reaction after they have been
allocated the total damage
points by a melee attack
action. This fighter makes
a free Retreat action.

name: Lead the charge
description:
A fighter can use this ability after ending a
move action within 1" of an enemy fighter.
Up to (X/2) Friendly fighters within 6"" of
this fighter can make a bonus move action,
but must end that move action closer to
this fighter.

name: Warcry
description:
Friendly fighters within 6  of this fighter
are no longer panicked, and does not have
to take panic tests until the end of the
battleround.

name: Strategize
description:
This ability can only be used once in each battle.
During this activation, when this fighter makes a wait action, roll (X) dice.
For each roll of 4+, you may add 1 wyrd dice do your saved wyrd dice.

name: Driven by Greed
description:
A fighter can only use this ability if it is
carrying, or is within 1 of a wyrdstone token or treasure token. Add 1 to the
Fight and Attacks characteristic of this fighter's next melee attack action.

name: Hunter's Eye
description:
For this fighter's next ranged attack action, add 1 to
the damage points allocated to the target by each hit and critical hit.

name: One with the Shadows
description:
If this fighter is in cover from an enemy fighter, it is not visible to that
fighter.

name: Slink Away
description: This fighter makes a free retreat action.

name: Murder Stab
description:
Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the
Fight characteristic of this fighter's next melee attack action.In addition, if
this ability is used while this fighter is not visible to enemy fighters, add the
1 to the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit from that melee
attack action.

name: Pack Tactics
description:
For this fighter's next attack action, you may add
1 to it's Fight characteristic for each friendly HENCHMAN within 1 of the
target.

name: Skitterleap
description:
Magical ability. A fighter cannot use this ability while
within 1" of an enemy fighter or when carrying a token. Remove this
fighter from the battlefield, then set it up on the battlefield floor or on a
platform, more than 6" from all enemy warriors, objective markers and
scenario tokens.

name: Gnawdoom
description:
Magical ability. Select an enemy fighter within 6" and
roll X d6. For each roll that exceeds the target's Defense characteristic,
allocate 2 damage points to that enemy fighter.

name: Enshrouding Mist
description:
Magical ability. Until the end of the
battleround, fighters within (X/2)" of this fighter are not visible to other
fighters.
